title: Aizopsis kamtschatica
taxonomy: Aizopsis kamtschatica belongs to the family Saxifragaceae. It is a perennial plant, native to the Kamchatka Peninsula in Russia. The classification of Aizopsis kamtschatica includes its genus Aizopsis, which is a small genus of flowering plants. This plant is closely related to the saxifrage genus. The family Saxifragaceae is a group of flowering plants commonly known as saxifrage or rock foams.

Aizopsis kamtschatica has been traditionally used in medicine, and its health benefits include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties.
